Search Results for

    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Method Save

    Save(Stream)

    Saves (copies) the stream's data to the specified stream. Uses default buffer size ReadWriteBytesCount and stream Length value.

    Declaration
    public virtual void Save(Stream destinationStream)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Stream destinationStream

    The stream to save the data to.

    Save(Stream, int)

    Saves (copies) all the stream's data to the specified stream. Uses stream Length value.

    Declaration
    public virtual void Save(Stream destinationStream, int bufferSize)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Stream destinationStream

    The stream to save the data to.
    int bufferSize

    The buffer.

    Save(Stream, int, long)

    Saves (copies) the stream's data to the specified stream.

    Declaration
    public virtual void Save(Stream destinationStream, int bufferSize, long length)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Stream destinationStream

    The stream to save the data to.
    int bufferSize

    The buffer size. By default ReadWriteBytesCount value is used.
    long length

    The stream data length to copy. By default the length is set to Length value.

    Save(string)

    Saves (copies) the stream's data to the specified stream. Uses default buffer size ReadWriteBytesCount and stream Length value.

    Declaration
    public virtual void Save(string filePath)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    string filePath

    The file path to save the stream data to.

    Save(string, int)

    Saves (copies) the stream's data to the specified stream. Uses stream Length value.

    Declaration
    public virtual void Save(string filePath, int bufferSize)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    string filePath

    The file path to save the stream data to.
    int bufferSize

    The buffer size. By default ReadWriteBytesCount value is used.

    Save(string, int, long)

    Saves (copies) the stream's data to the specified stream.

    Declaration
    public virtual void Save(string filePath, int bufferSize, long length)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    string filePath

    The file path to save the stream data to.
    int bufferSize

    The buffer size. By default ReadWriteBytesCount value is used.
    long length

    The stream data length to copy. By default the length is set to Length value.
